name: rec
description: Local, DOM-based browser session replay for agent-driven sessions.

scripts.build: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/daemon/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/mcp/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/playwright-launcher/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/demo/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/player/tsconfig.json && tsc -p packages/player/tsconfig.test.json && tsc -p packages/share-server/tsconfig.json && cd packages/player && ./node_modules/.bin/vite build
scripts.check: tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/daemon/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/cli/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/mcp/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/playwright-launcher/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/demo/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/player/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/share-server/tsconfig.json --noEmit
scripts.test: node --test packages/core/dist/storage.test.js packages/core/dist/config.test.js packages/core/dist/summary.test.js packages/daemon/dist/chat.test.js packages/daemon/dist/main.test.js packages/mcp/dist/main.test.js packages/playwright-launcher/dist/main.test.js packages/player/dist-test/projection.test.js packages/player/dist-test/humanize.test.js packages/player/dist-test/manifest.test.js packages/demo/dist/player.e2e.test.js packages/demo/dist/bootstrap.test.js packages/share-server/dist/main.test.js scripts/codex-rec-profile.test.mjs
scripts.package:macos: node scripts/assert-release-version.mjs && pnpm build && node scripts/package-macos.mjs
